essence: Keeps public streets, paths, and communal spaces clean, safe, and pleasant for the community.

identity.title: Street Cleaner (Street Scene Operative)
identity.summary: Maintains the cleanliness of streets, pavements, parks, and public areas through litter collection, sweeping, and waste handling.

salary.notes: Team leaders, mechanical sweeper operators, and night‑shift roles can exceed £30k-£35k+.

qualifications: Understanding of waste‑handling and environmental procedures
Ability to work outdoors in all weather conditions
Optional training for mechanical sweepers or small plant

lifestyle.description: Street cleaners work early mornings or daytime shifts maintaining the cleanliness of public spaces. Tasks include litter picking, sweeping, emptying bins, and reporting hazards. The role is active, outdoors, and essential to community wellbeing. It suits individuals who enjoy routine, independence, and contributing to a clean public environment.

habits: Communicates clearly with supervisors and the public
